bugs.error_message: Strength (and Dexterity/Intelligence) nodes with +% modifier showing as flat value (e.g. +24% Strength displayed as 0.24 flat)
bugs.root_cause: STRENGTH/DEXTERITY/INTELLIGENCE existed only as flat stats; Jaccard tiebreaker could not prefer _inc because no _inc variant existed, so % modifier texts fell through to the flat stat
bugs.fix: Renamed STRENGTH->STRENGTH_FLAT, added STRENGTH_INC; same for DEXTERITY and INTELLIGENCE. Updated stat_meta.py, node_modifier_pool.py, and test_models_stat.py.

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: Planner should be Builder
Gear stats not showing in stat page
bugs.root_cause: useEffect early-return guard `if (slots.every(s => !s))` skipped the engine/stats fetch entirely when no talent trees were selected, so gear-only builds never computed stats. Display condition `filledSlots === 0` also showed 'No trees selected' even when gear was equipped.
bugs.fix: Changed early-return to `if (slots.every(s => !s) && gear.length === 0)` so stats are fetched when gear is present. Updated 'No trees selected' display condition to `filledSlots === 0 && gear.length === 0`. Updated 'No stats' fallback to trigger when filledSlots > 0 || gear.length > 0.

bugs.error_message: Selecting one micro talent shows stats for all micro talents in the tree; same for slate medium talents
bugs.root_cause: _apply_node_recipes fell back to recipes_by_tree[tree][node_type] when a node was missing from node_recipes_by_id. That tree-level recipe contains aggregated stats for ALL nodes of that type, so selecting one node applied the whole group.
bugs.fix: Added elif node_recipes_by_id: return — when per-node filter is populated but a specific node is missing, contribute nothing instead of falling back. Old filter (node_recipes_by_id empty) still uses tree-level fallback for backward compat.
